heading: Authorization of appropriations for reimbursement of Commodity Credit Corporation
label: 667g–2 Authorization of appropriations for reimbursement of Commodity Credit Corporation
text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to reimburse the Commodity Credit Corporation for its investment in grain transferred pursuant to sections 667g to 667g–2 of this title.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , Agriculture, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 449 of Title 7
